.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.2 to support modern Maven features and compatibility with newer JDKs.
Upgrade Apache Maven distribution from 3.6.3 to 3.9.9 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.why_exists: Maven 3.6.3 may have issues or lack full support for Java 21 features; upgrading ensures build stability on the target JDK.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Add distributionType=only-script to optimize Maven wrapper download by excluding unnecessary binaries.

authorization/.gitignore.general_idea: Refine .gitignore to exclude nested target and build directories within source trees while preserving source files.
Add exclusions for Gradle build directories within source trees to .gitignore.

authorization/mvnw.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper script from an older version to version 3.3.2, replacing the legacy logic with the modern standard implementation.
authorization/mvnw.before:
# Maven Start Up Batch script
#
# Required ENV vars:
# ------------------
#   JAVA_HOME - location of a JDK home dir
authorization/mvnw.after:
# Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.2
#
# Optional ENV vars
# -----------------
#   JAVA_HOME - location of a JDK home dir, required when download maven via java source

authorization/mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTPS to HTTP in the script header.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.3.0.RELEASE to 3.4.0-RC1 to align with the Java 21 migration.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; the old 2.3.x parent is incompatible with the target JDK and modern Spring ecosystem.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; the compiler and runtime must be configured for the new version.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated spring-security-oauth2-autoconfigure with the modern spring-boot-starter-oauth2-authorization-server.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: The old OAuth2 autoconfigure artifact is removed in Spring Boot 3.x; the new starter is required for authorization server functionality.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server dependency as it is likely superseded or handled differently in the new setup.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: The dependency is removed in the new configuration, possibly due to consolidation into the authorization server starter or explicit security configuration.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-cloud-starter-zipkin with micrometer-tracing-bridge-brave and zipkin-reporter-brave to align with Spring Boot 3.x tracing standards.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Sleuth and the old Zipkin starter are deprecated/removed in favor of Micrometer Tracing in Spring Boot 3.x.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the spring-cloud-dependencies BOM as it is no longer needed or managed differently in the new Spring Boot version.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x manages Spring Cloud dependencies differently or the project no longer uses the full Spring Cloud suite requiring the BOM.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf with spring-boot-starter-mustache to change the templating engine.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is switching from Thymeleaf to Mustache for view rendering.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-security dependency explicitly.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Security is a core requirement for the authorization server and needs to be explicitly declared in the new setup.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add access-logger-logbook dependency for HTTP request/response logging.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition for logging access details.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-docker-compose dependency for local development support.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition to support Docker Compose integration.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-testcontainers dependency for integration testing.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition to support Testcontainers in tests.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-security-test dependency for security testing.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition to support security-specific test utilities.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add junit-jupiter testcontainers dependency for JUnit 5 integration with Testcontainers.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition to support JUnit 5 lifecycle with Testcontainers.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove junit-vintage-engine exclusion from spring-boot-starter-test as it is no longer needed or relevant.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: The exclusion is removed, likely because the project fully embraces JUnit 5 and no longer needs to exclude the vintage engine.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add native-maven-plugin for GraalVM native image support.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition to support building native images.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add cyclonedx-maven-plugin for software bill of materials (SBOM) generation.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition for security compliance and dependency tracking.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-javaformat-maven-plugin for code formatting enforcement.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: New feature addition to enforce code style.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-milestones repository for accessing milestone versions of Spring dependencies.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Required to resolve the 3.4.0-RC1 parent and other milestone dependencies.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-milestones plugin repository for accessing milestone versions of plugins.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Required to resolve milestone versions of plugins if any are used.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-authorization-server.version property to manage the version of the authorization server starter.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Explicit version management for the new authorization server dependency.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove spring-cloud.version property as it is no longer used.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: The property is no longer referenced after removing the Spring Cloud BOM.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove spring-boot-devtools dependency.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: The dependency is removed, possibly due to preference or not needed in the new setup.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Update project description from 'Authorization Server' to 'authorization'.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Cosmetic change to the project description.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add empty metadata sections for licenses, developers, and SCM.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Standardizing the POM structure with empty metadata placeholders.

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.3.0.RELEASE to 3.4.0-RC1 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
todo-api/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
todo-api/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler targets Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3.x which requires Java 17+.

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Cloud BOM and starter dependencies as they are no longer used or compatible in the new setup.
todo-api/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Hoxton is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; removing prevents dependency resolution conflicts.

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-cloud-starter-zipkin with explicit Micrometer Tracing and Zipkin Reporter dependencies.
todo-api/pom.xml.why_exists: spring-cloud-starter-zipkin is removed in Spring Cloud 2020.0.0+ (compatible with Boot 3); explicit dependencies are required for tracing.

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-security dependency which was missing or implicit before.
Add access-logger-logbook dependency for request/response logging.
Add spring-boot-docker-compose dependency for local development support.
Add spring-boot-testcontainers dependency for integration testing.
Add spring-security-test dependency for security testing.
Add junit-jupiter testcontainers dependency for JUnit 5 integration.
Remove JUnit Vintage engine exclusion as it is no longer needed or present in the new test starter.
Add GraalVM native-maven-plugin for native image compilation support.
Add CycloneDX maven plugin for software bill of materials generation.
Add Spring JavaFormat maven plugin for code style validation.
Add Spring Milestones repository and plugin repository to resolve RC dependencies.
Update groupId from lol.maki.dev.todo to lol.maki.dev to match new project structure.
Update description from 'Todo API Server' to 'todo-api'.
Add empty metadata sections for licenses, developers, and scm.

todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Replace the traditional Java class with a record to leverage modern Java features for immutable data carriers.
todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.before: public class Todo { ... private String todoId; ... public String getTodoId() { return todoId; } ... }
todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.after: public record Todo(String todoId, String todoTitle, boolean finished, Instant createdAt, String createdBy, Instant updatedAt, String updatedBy) { }

todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Add the Jilt annotation processor dependency to generate builder methods for the record.
Apply the Jilt @Builder annotation to the record to enable builder pattern usage.
Refactor imports to use explicit annotations and add new dependencies for Clock and IdGenerator.
Add Clock dependency injection to replace Instant.now() for testability.

todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Remove @CrossOrigin annotation, likely relying on global CORS configuration or removing explicit per-controller config.
Explicitly specify path attribute in @RequestMapping.
Change GET /{id} to throw 404 if not found instead of returning 204/empty body.
Switch from mutating entity setters to using a TodoBuilder pattern for creating new Todos.
todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.after:
Todo initialized = TodoBuilder.from(todo)
		.todoId(this.idGenerator.generateId().toString())
		.createdBy(email)
		.createdAt(now)
		.updatedBy(email)
		.updatedAt(now)
		.build();
Todo created = this.todoRepository.save(initialized);

todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Extract email from JWT claim instead of using subject for user identification.
Replace PUT mapping with PATCH mapping for partial updates.
Refactor update logic to use TodoBuilder and only update if fields are touched.
Access Todo fields via record-style accessor methods instead of getters.

Replace @Repository with @Component to use a more generic Spring stereotype annotation.
Refactor imports to be explicit rather than using a wildcard import.
Rename method from updateById to save and change implementation to return the saved entity instead of the previous value.

Reformat code indentation from spaces to tabs.
